decisions.text: TDMA-fixed channel access protocol adopted for 5.9 GHz V2X band.
decisions.note: DELIBERATELY WRONG — this was superseded. Transcript states dynamic protocol.

decisions.text: Interference threshold set at -100 dBm/MHz for V2X operations.
decisions.note: DELIBERATELY WRONG — transcript states -103 dBm/MHz. These reference minutes are from a superseded draft.

note: These reference minutes are intentionally incorrect to test overconfident grounding. A system that trusts reference over transcript will fail grounding validation.
